text: REVISED - Vaughan Metropolitan Centre to Finch West stations - Planned single-track operation, nightly starting at 11 p.m. from Tuesday, April 14 to Thursday, April 16, 2026
REVISED - Broadview to Woodbine stations - Early nightly closure starting at 11:59 p.m. - Tuesday, April 14 to Friday, April 17, 2026
